product_results.title: firelli Women Lace Up Platform Shoes Casual Fashion Sneakers Comfortable Walking Shoes

summary.text: Customers find these shoes good looking and trendy in appearance. They describe them as really nice quality shoes and a great shoe overall. The shoes are easy to clean. However, customers are disappointed with durability. Opinions are mixed regarding comfort, fit, sizing, and weight, with customers having different experiences in these areas.

authors_reviews.title: Looks really nice!
authors_reviews.text: I ordered this 3 times; the first pair was too small, the second pair got lost in transit, the third pair arrived fine and it fit me great. I mainly ordered these for a trip to Europe because the sole is thick and the material is NOT leather, which means they will stand up better to rain and the occasional puddle. The bonus is that the thick sole also makes my size 9 feet look a lot smaller!! What’s not to like about that? They are well made with no visible glue at the seams or missed stitches. A little more cushioning on the sole inside would have been nice (but is not a deal breaker) as I will be purchasing an insole with proper arch support to prevent fatigue on long days spent walking. They work great for my needs and I recommend them. Just be aware that they don’t look as high end as leather, if that matters to you.
authors_reviews.author: Louise Laliberté

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable for a platform shoe
authors_reviews.text: I got the black with white trim runner shoe. I wore them 14 hours the first day. My feet were not sore and I found them comfortable to walk in. The shoe looks and fits narrow but true to size. They look nice but as I have only worn a few times I cannot comment on how they will hold up. Arrived in 3 days.
authors_reviews.author: Alan Brown

authors_reviews.title: Great shoes
authors_reviews.text: Very comfortable shoes! True to size.
authors_reviews.author: Jessie

authors_reviews.title: They're OK I guess
authors_reviews.text: The shoes look great but I find they squish my baby toes. I don't usually have that problem.They are adequately comfortable. Not at all breathable so my feet tend to get pretty warm.Sizing was accurate. It's always a gamble buying shoes without trying them on first so overall, I'm pretty happy with my purchase.
authors_reviews.author: NancyC

authors_reviews.title: Narrow toe area
authors_reviews.text: I love those shoes, fits well but the toe area is very narrow, and hurts my toes, so I will be returning it for a bigger size.I recommend to go a half size up. And if u have wide width feet, those are not for you. Butvtheyvare lovely.
authors_reviews.author: Jenni williams

authors_reviews.title: Not worth the money
authors_reviews.text: Shoes look great but causes damage to the feet. The inside material/fabric is poorly made as it has irritated my skin and left scarring. I like to keep the shoe and use it along with layers of bandages but definitely not at this price! I am requesting a refund.
authors_reviews.author: PK

authors_reviews.title: Cute shoes, but super narrow, gave bad blisters
authors_reviews.text: Wore them for about 5 hours walking, gave terrible blisters on both of my pinky toes, as the threading/seam is right along where your pinky toe goes. The shoes seem smaller than normal, so maybe if you size up they would be better.Super cute shoes otherwise, wish they could have fit better.
authors_reviews.author: Kyle Logan
